description_long: This is a compact, tracked combat tactical vehicle featuring a robust, armored chassis and a prominent turret mounted with a large-caliber cannon and a secondary machine gun. The vehicle is equipped with continuous metal tracks for enhanced mobility over rough urban terrain, and its body is reinforced with thick, dark armor plating. The turret houses advanced targeting optics and ammunition belts, with visible exhaust and antennae for communication. The front of the vehicle is angular and fortified, while the sides display multiple road wheels and additional armor panels. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and a matte, dark finish suitable for urban operations.
description: A heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle with a large turret, cannon, and machine gun, finished in dark matte colors and designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular, reinforced front armor, the main cannon, and the machine gun mounted on the turret, with visible targeting optics and antennae.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous metal tracks, multiple road wheels, side armor panels, and the turret's ammunition feed.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, exhaust system, and the rear section of the tracks, with less detail on weaponry.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the turret, cannon, machine gun, and the right-side tracks and armor, mirroring the left but with different mechanical details visible.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible weapon mounts: a large-caliber cannon and a coaxial machine gun, both mounted on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, dark armor plating; turret and chassis are heavily reinforced with angular, sloped panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; vehicle is finished in solid dark matte colors.
